flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Montclair State University rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($21.4k → $26.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Montclair State University rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.3k → $15.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Montclair State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Montclair State University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (16.0k → 18.4k).
